title: FormControlsResponse
description: Response payload for `GET /api/v1/form-controls`. Returned by parrot-formdesigner's API for the toolbar palette.

controls.description: Registered form-control entries, in registration order.

type.description: Canonical id (FieldType.value or extension type id).

description.description: Description shown in the toolbar tooltip / help.

category.description: Grouping bucket (basic, selection, media, layout, advanced, ...).

render_hint.description: UI hint such as input | select | container.

supports_constraints.description: Whether the control supports validation constraints.

is_container.description: Whether the control nests other fields (groups, arrays).
